item.title: Can We Install Tractor Hubs Ourselves?
item.description: Watch the process of installing hubs on a tractor without professional help. See the tools, steps, and challenges involved in doing it yourself.

media:content.media:title: Can We Install Tractor Hubs Ourselves?
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of installing hubs on a tractor without professional help. See the tools, steps, and challenges involved in doing it yourself.

item.title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
item.description: Watch a snow blower run out of fuel and the attempt to get it going with just 2 gallons. See the challenge, solution, and results in this winter task.

media:content.media:title: Out of Fuel Snow Blower: Will 2 Gallons Work?
media:content.media:description: Watch a snow blower run out of fuel and the attempt to get it going with just 2 gallons. See the challenge, solution, and results in this winter task.

item.title: Is He Really Quitting? Jordan’s Last Day
item.description: Watch the emotional moment as Jordan faces his potential last day. See the reactions, conversations, and uncertainty surrounding his decision.

media:content.media:title: Is He Really Quitting? Jordan’s Last Day
media:content.media:description: Watch the emotional moment as Jordan faces his potential last day. See the reactions, conversations, and uncertainty surrounding his decision.

item.title: Another Huge Storm Hits the Yard
item.description: Watch the aftermath as a massive storm hits the yard. See the challenges of cleanup, damage assessment, and keeping the property safe during severe weather.

media:content.media:title: Another Huge Storm Hits the Yard
media:content.media:description: Watch the aftermath as a massive storm hits the yard. See the challenges of cleanup, damage assessment, and keeping the property safe during severe weather.

item.title: New Salford Tractor Arrives on the Yard
item.description: Watch a brand-new Salford tractor arrive on the farm. See the first look, setup, and reactions as it joins the equipment lineup.

item.title: New Salford Arrives on the Yard
item.description: Watch a new Salford piece of equipment arrive on the farm. See the unboxing, setup, and first impressions as it gets ready for work.

item.title: I’m Over the Winter Build
item.description: Watch the struggles and frustrations of finishing a winter build. See the challenges, progress, and relief as the project nears completion.

item.title: Preparing a 1965 Grain Truck for Sale
item.description: See the steps to clean, repair, and ready a 1965 grain truck for sale. A detailed look at vintage truck maintenance and preparation for potential buyers.

media:content.media:title: Preparing a 1965 Grain Truck for Sale
media:content.media:description: See the steps to clean, repair, and ready a 1965 grain truck for sale. A detailed look at vintage truck maintenance and preparation for potential buyers.

item.title: Blizzard Hits: Tackling the Cleanup
item.description: A heavy blizzard blankets the area, and it’s time to clear snow. Watch the team handle shoveling, plowing, and keeping the property safe and accessible.

media:content.media:title: Blizzard Hits: Tackling the Cleanup
media:content.media:description: A heavy blizzard blankets the area, and it’s time to clear snow. Watch the team handle shoveling, plowing, and keeping the property safe and accessible.

item.description: Meet the newest horse to arrive on the farm. Watch as it explores, interacts, and settles into its new surroundings.

item.title: John Deere: What’s Going On Here?
item.description: A surprising moment with a John Deere tractor or equipment. See what happened and why it caught the operator off guard on the farm.

item.title: Rare Moment Captured on the Farm
item.description: Witness an unusual event on the farm that doesn’t happen often. A surprising and memorable moment in everyday farm life.

item.title: World’s Largest Grain Cart Gets Stuck
item.description: Watch as the world’s biggest grain cart struggles and gets stuck. See the challenges and efforts involved in freeing this massive piece of farm equipment.

media:content.media:description: Watch as the world’s biggest grain cart struggles and gets stuck. See the challenges and efforts involved in freeing this massive piece of farm equipment.
